animation.css_keyframes: @keyframes fly_goof { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 55vh) rotate(10deg); } 40% { transform: translate(40vw, 25vh) rotate(-15deg); } 75% { transform: translate(85vw, 65vh) rotate(20deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 45vh) rotate(-5deg); } }

@keyframes fly_hawk { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 10vh) rotate(10deg); } 25% { transform: translate(15vw, 60vh) rotate(25deg); } 50% { transform: translate(50vw, 70vh) rotate(0deg); } 75% { transform: translate(85vw, 30vh) rotate(-15deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 15vh) rotate(-5deg); } }
